reviews.author: Lorenzo (Oracle)
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted the patch logic is sound but suggested adding kernel documentation comments to improve clarity and maintainability.
reviews.raw_body:
Logic LGTM, but would be nice to have some kdoc. With that addressed, feel free
to add:

Reviewed-by: Lorenzo Stoakes (Oracle) <ljs@kernel.org>

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new function, `folio_memcg_list_lru_alloc`, which allocates list_lru heads for folio objects under the control of memory cgroups (memcgs). The function is designed to be lightweight and RCU-safe, allowing it to quickly check if the list_lru heads already exist for a given memcg. If they do not exist, it allocates them. This patch is part of a larger effort to switch the THP shrinker to use list_lru, which requires this helper function to manage folio objects correctly.
